author: NETWORG
name: Power Platform: Script Library
description: Creates a TypeScript web resource project with Rollup bundler (UMD output). Supports npm packages via ES module imports, bundled into a single .js file. The UMD namespace (publisherprefix_libraryname) is the global for Dataverse form/button references. Build with 'dotnet build' — the SDK runs npm install and rollup automatically. After generating, add as a project reference from the solution that uses it.

PublisherPrefix.description: Publisher prefix (e.g., talxis, udpp). Combined with LibraryName to form the web resource name and UMD namespace.

LibraryName.description: Library name without prefix (e.g., documentgen, coreappshome). Combined with PublisherPrefix to form the web resource name (prefix_name) and UMD namespace.
